narrative_constraints.statement: Green (vegetation) creates a buffer between private and public space, using meadows with shrubs and trees.

provenance.quoted_text:
Weides met heesters en bomen
Groen creëert een buffer tussen privé en openbaar

reasons: Stated as a design intention in a beeldkwaliteitplan (image quality plan), which is indicative but not a binding regels clause.
Page is purely illustrative with photo captions.

narrative_constraints.statement: A semi-private transition zone between public and private space is required, articulated through climbing plants and façade filters.

provenance.quoted_text:
Semi-private zone Overgang openbaar/privé
Klimplanten gevels. Filters voor gevels

reasons: Stated as a design intention in a beeldkwaliteitplan via photo captions, not a binding regels clause.

narrative_constraints.statement: Play elements should provide play guidance (speelaanleiding) rather than conventional play equipment (speeltoestel).

reasons: Caption in beeldkwaliteitplan; expresses a qualitative design preference, not a binding rule.

narrative_constraints.statement: Bridges should serve slow traffic (langzaam verkeer) and should be recognisable/distinctive in design.

reasons: Caption in beeldkwaliteitplan; expresses a qualitative design intention, not a binding rule.

narrative_constraints.statement: Parks should feature diverse types of planting, including a mix of tree groups and hedges to provide spatial variety.

provenance.quoted_text:
Park met divers typen beplanting
Mix boomgroepen en hagen. Zorgen voor ruimtelijke afwisseling

reasons: Caption in beeldkwaliteitplan; expresses a qualitative landscape design intention, not a binding rule.
